title: wolfhsm-sys: build.rs
description: Implement wolfhsm-sys/build.rs: (1) read DEP_WOLFCRYPT_SYS_INCLUDE and DEP_WOLFCRYPT_SYS_SETTINGS_INCLUDE; (2) propagate to wolfhsm-src via unsafe { env::set_var(...) } (safe in single-threaded build script, must be wrapped in unsafe for Rust 2024+); (3) read DEP_WOLFHSM_SRC_INCLUDE and DEP_WOLFHSM_SRC_LIB; (4) emit cargo:rustc-link-search=native and link-lib=static for wolfhsm and wolfhsm_shims; (5) run bindgen over wrapper.h with clang args for all include paths, allowlist_type wh.*/WH.*/posix_transport_.*, allowlist_function wh_Client_.*, allowlist_item WH_.*; (6) compile shims.c as separate cc::Build into libwolfhsm_shims.a.
